prTitle: fix(workflow): ignore nested SvelteKit $types imports in post-exec checks (closes #98)
prBody:
## Summary

Fixes #98. The workflow post-execution import-resolution check (`checkImportResolution` in `post-execution-checks.ts`) falsely flagged generated SvelteKit `$types` imports as unresolved. These modules don't exist on disk during post-exec checks because they're generated during the framework build — the same situation already handled for React Router `+types` imports.

This extends the existing skip logic to also ignore relative SvelteKit `$types` imports, including nested-route imports like `../../routes/blog/$types`.

## Change

- `src/resources/extensions/workflow/post-execution-checks.ts`: add a second regex to the existing `continue` guard so `$types` imports (incl. nested) are skipped alongside `+types`.
- Added a regression test exercising the nested `../../routes/blog/$types` case, asserting it produces no findings.

## Gates

- Targeted regression test: 53 pass, 0 fail (new nested `$types` test included)
- `typecheck:extensions`: clean
- `npm run build`: success
- `npm run test:unit` (full): 9750 pass, 0 fail, 9 skip
- Independent reviewer subagent: APPROVE (regex verified to match `./$types`, `../$types`, `../../routes/blog/$types`, `../$types/foo` and reject over-match traps `./$typesomething`, `./mytypes`, `./types`; scope clean)

## Scope

Touches only `post-execution-checks.ts` and its test.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
issueBody:
> /cc @claude — auto-filed by `/upstream-cherry-pick`. Severity, labels, > conflict-risk, and the otto-cli implementation guidance below are populated > so the implementation phase can **confirm and apply** rather than start from > scratch. Pick this up via `/upstream-port-from-issue {{N}}` when ready. ## otto-cli implementation guidance verdict: manual-port # 6bef491 — fix(gsd): ignore nested SvelteKit types imports ## Target file(s) - src/resources/extensions/workflow/post-execution-checks.ts - src/resources/extensions/workflow/tests/post-execution-checks.test.ts ## Divergence Otto's `post-execution-checks.ts` at line ~324 already short-circuits `^\.{1,2}/\+types/` imports (React Router generated types), but it does NOT have the corresponding `$types` (SvelteKit) branch the upstream had pre-patch. So otto either never carried the SvelteKit case or has already trimmed it. The upstream patch widens the `$types` regex from `^\.{1,2}/\$types(?:$|\/)` to `^(?:\.{1,2}/)+(?:[^/]+/)*\$types(?:$|/)` to catch nested-route imports like `../../routes/foo/$types`. Otto needs to add the `$types` branch entirely (with the wider regex) if SvelteKit projects are supported targets. ## Concrete edits 1. In `src/resources/extensions/workflow/post-execution-checks.ts`, in the import-resolution loop where the `+types` short-circuit lives (~line 324), add an OR branch: `|| /^(?:\.{1,2}\/)+(?:[^/]+\/)*\$types(?:$|\/)/.test(importPath)`. 2. Update the surrounding comment to mention SvelteKit generated `$types`. 3. Port the new tests from upstream's `tests/post-execution-checks.test.ts` (22 added lines) — they exercise nested `$types` paths. ## Verdict manual-port — small, high-precision fix. Note this is value-add only if otto serves SvelteKit users; if SvelteKit is out-of-scope for otto, you could downgrade to do-not-port. The change is purely additive and won't regress non-Svelte projects.
Upstream diff (git show) ```diff commit 6bef491d72a0dadb9bb553b756b1b6db5e4dd339 Author: Cursor Agent Date: Sun May 31 02:20:29 2026 +0000 fix(gsd): ignore nested SvelteKit types imports diff --git a/src/resources/extensions/gsd/post-execution-checks.ts b/src/resources/extensions/gsd/post-execution-checks.ts index 7037b64..0505000 100644 --- a/src/resources/extensions/gsd/post-execution-checks.ts +++ b/src/resources/extensions/gsd/post-execution-checks.ts @@ -323,7 +323,7 @@ export function checkImportResolution( // block task completion on these imports. if ( /^\.{1,2}\/\+types\//.test(importPath) || - /^\.{1,2}\/\$types(?:$|\/)/.test(importPath) + /^(?:\.{1,2}\/)+(?:[^/]+\/)*\$types(?:$|\/)/.test(importPath) ) { continue; } diff --git a/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/post-execution-checks.test.ts b/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/post-execution-checks.test.ts index 3d1a776..2816c5a 100644 --- a/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/post-execution-checks.test.ts +++ b/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/post-execution-checks.test.ts @@ -473,6 +473,28 @@ describe("checkImportResolution", () => { } }); + test("ignores nested generated SvelteKit $types imports", () => { + tempDir = join(tmpdir(), `post-exec-test-${Date.now()}`); + mkdirSync(tempDir, { recursive: true }); + mkdirSync(join(tempDir, "src", "lib", "components"), { recursive: true }); + writeFileSync( + join(tempDir, "src", "lib", "components", "RouteCard.ts"), + "import type { PageData } from '../../routes/blog/$types';\nexport const data = {} as PageData;" + ); + + try { + const task = createTask({ + id: "T01", + key_files: ["src/lib/components/RouteCard.ts"], + }); + + const results = checkImportResolution(task, [], tempDir); + assert.deepEqual(results, []); + } finally { + rmSync(tempDir, { recursive: true, force: true }); + } + }); + test("fails when import doesn't resolve", () => { tempDir = join(tmpdir(), `post-exec-test-${Date.now()}`); mkdirSync(tempDir, { recursive: true }); ```
## Classification | Field | Value | |---|---| | Severity | `severity:nice-to-have-fix` | | Conflict risk | `conflict-risk:none` — No touched file under any vendored packages/pi-* path. | | Action | `type:port-required` | | Analyzed | yes — guidance above is implementation-ready | | Upstream | open-gsd/gsd-pi | ## Upstream commit - **SHA**: `6bef491d72a0dadb9bb553b756b1b6db5e4dd339` - **Date**: 2026-05-31T02:20:29Z - **Author**: Cursor Agent - **Subject**: `fix(gsd): ignore nested SvelteKit types imports` - **Body**: ``` (none) ``` ## Upstream context No upstream PR or issue context found. ## Upstream files touched (2) > ⚠️ These are **upstream** paths. otto-cli has renamed/restructured packages > (e.g. `packages/ai` → `packages/pi-ai`). The otto-cli targets are in the > implementation guidance section above, not here. - `src/resources/extensions/gsd/post-execution-checks.ts` - `src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/post-execution-checks.test.ts` ## Suggested next steps ```sh # Inspect upstream change git -C ../gsd-pi show 6bef491 # Attempt cherry-pick (only if guidance says paths align) git -C ../gsd-pi show 6bef491 | git -C . am -3 # Or hand off to the port workflow /upstream-port-from-issue {{N}} ``` --- Auto-filed on 2026-06-05 by the upstream-cherry-pick skill.
